name: Fallback C2 Channels Detection
description: Detects hosts connecting to multiple potential C2 endpoints in sequence
query:
// Detect fallback channel behavior
// Trigger on a host making connections to multiple unusual destinations after failures
events from ndr_flow
where direction = "outbound"
  and destination_port = 443
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 100
within 120 seconds
